startPoint.en: Talk to Reldo in the Varrock palace library.
startPoint.es: Habla con Reldo en la biblioteca del palacio de Varrock.

rewards.display: If you are a member, you can talk to Historian Minas in the Varrock Museum to receive 5 kudos and an antique lamp that gives 1,000 experience in a skill of level 20 or above.

steps.filename: Shield of Arrav searching the bookcase.png
steps.caption: Location of the bookcase

text.en: Talk to Reldo in the Varrock Palace library.
text.es: Habla con Reldo en la biblioteca del Varrock Palace.

chatOptions: 1 I'm in search of a quest.

text.en: Search the east side of the centre bookcases (with the navy blue book) for The Shield of Arrav book, then read it.
text.es: Registra el lado este de las estanterías centrales (con el libro azul marino) para encontrar el libro The Shield of Arrav, y luego léelo.

text.en: Talk to Reldo and ask about the Phoenix Gang.
text.es: Habla con Reldo y pregúntale sobre la Phoenix Gang.

chatOptions: 1 Do you know where I can find the Phoenix Gang?

text.en: Talk to Baraek who is located in the north-east of Varrock square, and give him 10 coins. Ask him every question available.
text.es: Habla con Baraek, que se encuentra al noreste de la plaza de Varrock, y dale 10 monedas. Pregúntale todas las preguntas disponibles.

chatOptions: 1 Can you tell me where I can find the Phoenix Gang?

text.en: Travel to the Phoenix Gang Hideout which is located south of Aubury's Rune Shop. It will be marked by a dungeon link to the Misthalin Underground on the map.
text.es: Viaja hasta el Phoenix Gang Hideout, situado al sur de la Aubury's Rune Shop. Estará marcado por un enlace de mazmorra hacia el Misthalin Underground en el mapa.

text.en: Climb down the ladder.
text.es: Baja por la escalera.

text.en: Talk to Straven and ask to join. Tell him you know who he is.
text.es: Habla con Straven y pídele unirte. Dile que sabes quién es.

chatOptions: 1 I'd like to offer you my services.

text.en: Go to the Blue Moon Inn which is just north of Varrock's southern entrance.
text.es: Ve a la Blue Moon Inn, justo al norte de la entrada sur de Varrock.

text.en: Kill Jonny the beard.
text.es: Mata a Jonny the beard.

text.en: Grab the Intel report that he drops.
text.es: Recoge el Intel report que suelta.

text.en: Talk to Straven.
text.es: Habla con Straven.

text.en: Search the chest in the south-west corner of the hideout for a broken shield.
text.es: Registra el cofre en la esquina suroeste del escondite en busca de un escudo roto.

text.en: After climbing back up the ladder, enter the house east of the Phoenix Gang Hideout and go up the ladder there.
text.es: Después de volver a subir por la escalera, entra en la casa al este del Phoenix Gang Hideout y sube por la escalera que hay allí.

text.en: Pick up the two Phoenix crossbows on the floor, you will need these for the next gang.
text.es: Recoge las dos Phoenix crossbows del suelo, las necesitarás para la siguiente banda.

text.en: Talk to Charlie the Tramp located just north of Varrock's southern entrance. Ask him what's down the alley.
text.es: Habla con Charlie the Tramp, situado justo al norte de la entrada sur de Varrock. Pregúntale qué hay al final del callejón.)

chatOptions: 3 Do you know where I can find the Black Arm Gang hideout?

text.en: Follow the alley to the west and enter the building.
text.es: Sigue el callejón hacia el oeste y entra en el edificio.

text.en: Talk to Katrine.
text.es: Habla con Katrine.

chatOptions: 1 I've heard you're the Black Arm Gang.
1 I want to become a member of your gang.
1 Well, you can give me a try, can't you?
1 No problem. I'll get you two phoenix crossbows.

text.en: Talk to Katrine again to give her the crossbows.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con Katrine para entregarle las ballestas.

text.en: Head north through the door and climb up the staircase.
text.es: Dirígete al norte a través de la puerta y sube por la escalera.

text.en: Open and search the cupboard on the south-eastern wall for the other broken shield piece.
text.es: Abre y registra el armario en la pared sureste en busca de la otra pieza del escudo roto.

text.en: Use one half of the shield on the other for a restored shield.
text.es: Usa una mitad del escudo sobre la otra para restaurar el escudo.

text.en: Talk to King Roald located in the immediate east room of the Varrock Palace.
text.es: Habla con King Roald, situado en la sala inmediatamente al este del Varrock Palace.

chatOptions: 1 Talk about the Shield of Arrav.

text.en: If you have completed Priest in Peril
text.es: Si has completado Priest in Peril

chatOptions: 2 Talk about the Shield of Arrav.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
